heading: Conflicts of interest
label: 5218 Conflicts of interest
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this division”, meaning div. A of , , , known as the Emergency Economic Stabilization Act of 2008, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. children.text: conflicts arising in the selection or hiring of contractors or advisors, including asset managers;
the management of the troubled assets held;
any other potential conflict of interest, as the Secretary deems necessary or appropriate in the public interest.

children.heading: Timing
children.label: b Timing
children.text: Regulations or guidelines required by this section shall be issued as soon as practicable after .October 3, 2008
